usage: ppzip -u [options] <zipFile> [<zipFile> ...]
  -u, --unzip                Unzip target files
  -o=VALUE                   Unzipped output directory path
  -p=VALUE                   Maximum parallel count
  -v, --verbose              Verbose processing
  -s, --statistics           Show debug statistics
  -h, --help                 Show this help
